ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report
Off Calendar May-21-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jaime V. Raba appeared via zoom for Carmen Sosa (petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding that the distribution to be placed in a Cutma account, that the minor is not financially mature, and that if extended to age 21 he won't lose out on government assisted programs. The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Thompson. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-15-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jaime Raba, via Zoom, for Carmen Sosa, Personal Representative.

Counsel reports on the status of the pending litigation and advises that there have been some settlement discussions with counsel for decedent's surviving spouse.

The court takes the matter under submission with the intent to extend administration for six months.

Judge: Hon. Ronald Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Yang. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Apr-26-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Mar-15-2022 Continued To Apr-26-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jaime Raba, via ZOOM, for Carmen Sosa, Personal Representative.

The court queries counsel regarding the status of an Inventory and Appraisal ("I&A") and reminds counsel that at the previous calling of this matter, the court instructed him to file an I&A with as much information as possible by today's hearing. Counsel advises that he misunderstood the court's instructions from the previous hearing and offers testimony regarding why an I&A has not been filed as well as the status of the related family law matter which included a ruling regarding the sole subject of the I&A. The court advises counsel that it will not be imposing sanctions at this time but orders counsel to file an I&A by the next calling of this matter.

The Status on Filing of Inventory and Appraisal is continued to Apr-26-2022 at 9:00 am. If an Inventory and Appraisal is filed by Apr-19-2022, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Gomez. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jan-25-2022 Continued To Mar-15-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jaime Raba, via ZOOM, for Carmen Sosa, Administrator.

The court queries counsel regarding the status of an Inventory and Appraisal (I&A). Counsel reports that an unresolved, related Family Law matter has caused the delay in finalizing the I&A. Counsel advises that there is a hearing in the related matter set for Feb-22-2022 and he hopes to be able to complete and file the I&A shortly thereafter. After additional discussion, the court suggests that counsel file a I&A with as much information that he can provide to the court, by the next calling of this matter.

The Status of Filing of the Inventory and Appraisal is continued to Mar-15-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Gomez. Not reported.
